_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - Pterodactyl® https://pterodactyl.io
name: TaystJK
author: admin@example.com
description: Runs TaystJK dedicated server on Pterodactyl from a source-built runtime image without bundling copyrighted Jedi Academy game assets. TaystJK remains the default and only automatically managed runtime path. Users may still point startup at manually uploaded alternative binaries or mod folders when they explicitly provide them. Includes a lightweight runtime addon loader for user-owned top-level Bash and Python scripts under /home/container/addons, plus image-managed addon docs, examples, and helper defaults inside that addon area, and an optional anti-VPN runtime supervisor with stdout-first event capture, online API checks, local cache, public decision broadcasts, audit logging, allowlist support and weighted log-only/block decisions.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update
apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates curl tar unzip
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server
cat > /tmp/install_taystjk.sh <<'EOS'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

COLOR_RESET=""
COLOR_BOLD=""
COLOR_INFO=""
COLOR_OK=""
COLOR_WARN=""
COLOR_ERROR=""

setup_colors() {
  if [[ -t 1 && -z "${NO_COLOR:-}" ]]; then
    COLOR_RESET=$'\033[0m'
    COLOR_BOLD=$'\033[1m'
    COLOR_INFO=$'\033[36m'
    COLOR_OK=$'\033[32m'
    COLOR_WARN=$'\033[33m'
    COLOR_ERROR=$'\033[31m'
  fi
}

print_header() {
  printf '%s\n' "============================================================"
  printf '%s\n' " TaystJK Installer"
  printf '%s\n' " Created by akiondev"
  printf '%s\n\n' "============================================================"
}

section() {
  printf '%b\n' "${COLOR_BOLD}${1}${COLOR_RESET}"
}

kv() {
  printf '%-16s %s\n' "$1" "$2"
}

info() {
  printf '%b\n' "${COLOR_INFO}[INFO]${COLOR_RESET} $*"
}

ok() {
  printf '%b\n' "${COLOR_OK}[ OK ]${COLOR_RESET} $*"
}

warn() {
  printf '%b\n' "${COLOR_WARN}[WARN]${COLOR_RESET} $*"
}

log() {
  info "$*"
}

fail() {
  printf '%b\n' "${COLOR_ERROR}[ERROR]${COLOR_RESET} $*" >&2
  printf '\n' >&2
  section "What to Check Next" >&2
  printf '%s\n' "- Confirm the selected asset archive contains GameData/base/assets0.pk3 or base/assets0.pk3" >&2
  printf '%s\n' "- Confirm COPYRIGHT_ACKNOWLEDGED is set to true" >&2
  printf '%s\n' "- Confirm the selected mod directory and config names are valid" >&2
  exit 1
}

require_safe_component() {
  local value="$1"
  local variable_name="$2"

  if [[ -z "$value" || "$value" == "." || "$value" == ".." || "$value" == *"/"* || "$value" == *"\\"* || ! "$value" =~ ^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9._-]*$ ]]; then
    fail "${variable_name} must be a simple relative name using only letters, numbers, dots, underscores or dashes"
  fi
}

resolve_active_game_dir() {
  local requested="$1"
  local requested_lower

  requested_lower="$(printf '%s' "$requested" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')"
  if [[ -z "$requested_lower" || "$requested_lower" == "base" ]]; then
    printf 'base\n'
    return
  fi

  require_safe_component "$requested" "FS_GAME_MOD"
  printf '%s\n' "$requested"
}

is_taystjk_managed_mod_dir() {
  local mod_dir="$1"
  [[ "$mod_dir" == "taystjk" ]]
}

is_base_mode() {
  local mod_dir="$1"
  [[ "$mod_dir" == "base" ]]
}

describe_mod_ownership() {
  local mod_dir="$1"

  if is_taystjk_managed_mod_dir "$mod_dir"; then
    printf 'image-managed TaystJK\n'
  elif is_base_mode "$mod_dir"; then
    printf 'manual base assets\n'
  else
    printf 'manual user-supplied\n'
  fi
}

prepare_selected_mod_directory() {
  local mod_path="/mnt/server/${active_game_dir}"

  if is_taystjk_managed_mod_dir "$active_game_dir"; then
    mkdir -p "$mod_path"
    return 0
  fi

  if is_base_mode "$active_game_dir"; then
    return 0
  fi

  if [[ -d "$mod_path" ]]; then
    return 0
  fi

  warn "Configured manual mod directory ${active_game_dir} does not exist yet"
  warn "Only taystjk is prepared automatically. Upload manual alternative mod folders into ${mod_path} before startup"
}

print_path_status() {
  local label="$1"
  local path="$2"
  local kind="${3:-file}"

  if [[ "$kind" == "dir" ]]; then
    if [[ -d "$path" ]]; then
      ok "${label}: found at ${path}"
    else
      warn "${label}: missing at ${path}"
    fi
    return
  fi

  if [[ -f "$path" ]]; then
    ok "${label}: found at ${path}"
  else
    warn "${label}: missing at ${path}"
  fi
}

list_dir_files() {
  local path="$1"
  local pattern="${2:-*}"
  local files=()
  local file
  local result=""

  if [[ ! -d "$path" ]]; then
    printf 'directory missing\n'
    return
  fi

  while IFS= read -r file; do
    files+=("$file")
  done < <(
    find "$path" -maxdepth 1 -type f -name "$pattern" -printf '%f\n' 2>/dev/null | sort
  )

  for file in "${files[@]}"; do
    if [[ -n "$result" ]]; then
      result+=", "
    fi
    result+="$file"
  done

  if [[ -n "$result" ]]; then
    printf '%s\n' "$result"
  else
    printf 'none detected\n'
  fi
}

print_install_summary() {
  section "Installation Summary"
  kv "Assets mode    :" "$GAME_ASSETS_MODE"
  kv "Mod directory  :" "$active_game_dir"
  kv "Mod mode       :" "$(describe_mod_ownership "$active_game_dir")"
  kv "Server config  :" "${active_game_dir}/${SERVER_CONFIG}"
  kv "Server port    :" "$SERVER_PORT"
  printf '\n'
}

print_install_checks() {
  section "Installation Checks"
  ok "Server directories created"
  if is_taystjk_managed_mod_dir "$active_game_dir"; then
    ok "Managed TaystJK mod directory prepared at /mnt/server/${active_game_dir}"
  elif is_base_mode "$active_game_dir"; then
    ok "Base assets directory ready at /mnt/server/base"
  elif [[ -d "/mnt/server/${active_game_dir}" ]]; then
    ok "Manual mod directory detected at /mnt/server/${active_game_dir}"
  else
    warn "Manual mod directory is not present yet at /mnt/server/${active_game_dir}"
  fi
  print_path_status "Base assets" "/mnt/server/base/assets0.pk3"
  printf '\n'
}

print_install_inventory() {
  section "File Inventory"
  kv "Base files      :" "$(list_dir_files /mnt/server/base 'assets*.pk3')"
  kv "Mod files       :" "$(list_dir_files "/mnt/server/${active_game_dir}")"
  printf '\n'
}

print_install_result() {
  section "Result"
  info "Installation complete"
  if [[ -f /mnt/server/base/assets0.pk3 ]]; then
    ok "Server can proceed to runtime startup checks"
  else
    warn "Upload your legally owned Jedi Academy base assets to /mnt/server/base"
  fi
}

cd /mnt/server
setup_colors
print_header

: "${GAME_ASSETS_MODE:=manual}"
: "${GAME_ASSETS_URL:=}"
: "${GAME_ASSETS_ARCHIVE_TYPE:=auto}"
: "${GAME_ASSETS_SHA256:=}"
: "${COPYRIGHT_ACKNOWLEDGED:=false}"
: "${SERVER_PORT:=29070}"
: "${SERVER_CONFIG:=server.cfg}"
: "${FS_GAME_MOD:=taystjk}"

[[ "${COPYRIGHT_ACKNOWLEDGED}" == "true" ]] || fail "COPYRIGHT_ACKNOWLEDGED must be true. This egg does not distribute Jedi Academy assets."

mkdir -p \
  /mnt/server/base \
  /mnt/server/logs \
  /mnt/server/addons \
  /mnt/server/addons/docs \
  /mnt/server/addons/examples \
  /mnt/server/addons/defaults \
  /tmp/taystjk-install

require_safe_component "$SERVER_CONFIG" "SERVER_CONFIG"
active_game_dir="$(resolve_active_game_dir "$FS_GAME_MOD")"
prepare_selected_mod_directory
print_install_summary

extract_assets_archive() {
  local archive="$1"
  local workdir="/tmp/taystjk-install/assets"
  rm -rf "$workdir"
  mkdir -p "$workdir"

  case "$GAME_ASSETS_ARCHIVE_TYPE" in
    auto)
      if tar -tzf "$archive" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        tar -xzf "$archive" -C "$workdir"
      elif unzip -t "$archive" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        unzip -oq "$archive" -d "$workdir"
      else
        fail "Could not detect asset archive type automatically."
      fi
      ;;
    tar.gz|tgz)
      tar -xzf "$archive" -C "$workdir"
      ;;
    zip)
      unzip -oq "$archive" -d "$workdir"
      ;;
    *)
      fail "Unsupported GAME_ASSETS_ARCHIVE_TYPE: $GAME_ASSETS_ARCHIVE_TYPE"
      ;;
  esac

  if [[ -d "$workdir/GameData/base" ]]; then
    cp -an "$workdir/GameData/base"/* /mnt/server/base/ || true
  elif [[ -d "$workdir/base" ]]; then
    cp -an "$workdir/base"/* /mnt/server/base/ || true
  else
    cp -an "$workdir"/* /mnt/server/base/ || true
  fi

  [[ -f /mnt/server/base/assets0.pk3 ]] || fail "Asset archive extracted, but base/assets0.pk3 was not found."
}

if is_taystjk_managed_mod_dir "$active_game_dir" && [[ ! -f "/mnt/server/${active_game_dir}/${SERVER_CONFIG}" ]]; then
  cat > "/mnt/server/${active_game_dir}/${SERVER_CONFIG}" <<CFG
seta sv_hostname "TaystJK Pterodactyl Server"
seta g_motd "Powered by TaystJK on Pterodactyl"
seta sv_maxclients "16"
seta dedicated "2"
seta net_port "${SERVER_PORT}"
seta g_gametype "0"
set d1 "set g_gametype 0; map mp/ffa3; set nextmap vstr d1"
vstr d1
CFG
fi

case "$GAME_ASSETS_MODE" in
  manual)
    info "GAME_ASSETS_MODE is set to manual"
    warn "Upload your legally owned Jedi Academy files so that /mnt/server/base/assets0.pk3 exists"
    ;;
  url)
    [[ -n "$GAME_ASSETS_URL" ]] || fail "GAME_ASSETS_MODE=url requires GAME_ASSETS_URL"
    local_archive="/tmp/taystjk-install/game_assets"
    info "Downloading user-provided game assets archive"
    curl -L --fail --retry 3 "$GAME_ASSETS_URL" -o "$local_archive"

    if [[ -n "$GAME_ASSETS_SHA256" ]]; then
      info "Verifying SHA256"
      echo "${GAME_ASSETS_SHA256}  ${local_archive}" | sha256sum -c -
    fi

    extract_assets_archive "$local_archive"
    ;;
  none)
    info "GAME_ASSETS_MODE is set to none"
    warn "Assuming assets will be mounted or added later"
    ;;
  *)
    fail "Unsupported GAME_ASSETS_MODE: $GAME_ASSETS_MODE"
    ;;
esac

print_install_checks
print_install_inventory
info "Selected fs_game mod directory: ${active_game_dir}"
if is_taystjk_managed_mod_dir "$active_game_dir"; then
  ok "taystjk remains the only automatically prepared mod directory"
else
  warn "Selected mod directory ${active_game_dir} is treated as a manual user-owned path"
  warn "Provide ${active_game_dir}/${SERVER_CONFIG} and any required mod files yourself before startup"
fi

print_install_result

EOS
chmod +x /tmp/install_taystjk.sh
/tmp/install_taystjk.sh

variables.name: Server Binary
variables.description: Runtime variable. Default image-managed dedicated server executable name built from TaystJK source. You may point this at a manually uploaded alternative binary, but only the TaystJK binary is automatically synced and maintained by the image.

variables.name: fs_game Mod Directory
variables.description: Runtime variable. Active mod directory. Default is taystjk because the image-managed TaystJK runtime installs its bundled jaPRO-oriented content there. Use base for vanilla/base, or japlus, japro, mbii and other values only after manually uploading that mod folder yourself.

variables.name: Server Config
variables.description: Runtime variable. Configuration file executed at startup inside the active mod folder. The managed TaystJK default path can create this automatically when missing. Manual mod directories such as base, japlus, japro or mbii must provide their own config file.

variables.name: Server Config Overrides Enabled
variables.description: Runtime variable. If true, non-empty override fields such as SERVER_RCON_PASSWORD, SERVER_HOSTNAME, SERVER_MOTD, SERVER_MAXCLIENTS and SERVER_GAMETYPE are written into the active server.cfg. If false, those config values stay user-owned and runtime helpers read directly from the active config/defaults.

variables.name: Server RCON Password
variables.description: Runtime variable. Optional managed override for rconpassword in the active server.cfg when server config overrides are enabled. Leave blank to use the current config value instead. Addons and helper commands can read the effective value automatically through the runtime state files.

variables.name: Server Hostname Override
variables.description: Runtime variable. Optional managed override for sv_hostname in the active server.cfg when server config overrides are enabled. Leave blank to use the current config value instead.

variables.name: Server MOTD Override
variables.description: Runtime variable. Optional managed override for g_motd in the active server.cfg when server config overrides are enabled. Leave blank to use the current config value instead.

variables.name: Server Max Clients Override
variables.description: Runtime variable. Optional managed override for sv_maxclients in the active server.cfg when server config overrides are enabled. Leave blank to use the current config value instead.

variables.name: Server Gametype Override
variables.description: Runtime variable. Optional managed override for g_gametype in the active server.cfg when server config overrides are enabled. Leave blank to use the current config value instead.

variables.name: Extra Startup Args
variables.description: Runtime variable. Optional additional startup flags. Use shell-style quotes around values with spaces; shell control operators are not allowed.

variables.name: Debug Startup Output
variables.description: Runtime variable. Enable extra startup diagnostics in the console output.

variables.name: Addon Support Enabled
variables.description: Runtime variable. Enable the lightweight addon loader for top-level .sh and .py scripts in the addon directory before normal server startup. Rename a top-level addon file to end with .disable if you want to keep it without running it.

variables.name: Addon Checkserverstatus Enabled
variables.description: Runtime variable. Enable or disable the built-in checkserverstatus addon helper that is refreshed from the image and installed into /home/container/bin during managed startup.

variables.name: Addon Chatlogger Enabled
variables.description: Runtime variable. Enable or disable the built-in chat logger addon helper that tails the active server.log and writes clean daily player chat logs into /home/container/chatlogs during managed startup.

variables.name: Addon Directory
variables.description: Runtime variable. Directory under /home/container that stores user-owned top-level addons plus image-managed docs, examples, and helper defaults in docs/, examples/, and defaults/ subdirectories.

variables.name: Addon Strict Mode
variables.description: Runtime variable. If true, user addon failures or timeouts stop startup. If false, user addon failures are logged and startup continues.

variables.name: Addon Timeout Seconds
variables.description: Runtime variable. Per-addon timeout in seconds for top-level user addon scripts before the loader treats the script as timed out.

variables.name: Addon Log Output
variables.description: Runtime variable. If true, user addon stdout and stderr are shown in the console. If false, only loader status messages are shown.

variables.name: Copyright Acknowledged
variables.description: Required for install and runtime. Must be true. Confirms that you will provide only legally owned Jedi Academy files.

variables.name: Game Assets Mode
variables.description: Install-time variable. manual, url or none. Used by the installer during install or reinstall.

variables.name: Game Assets URL
variables.description: Install-time variable. Direct URL to your own legally provided game asset archive.

variables.name: Game Assets Archive Type
variables.description: Install-time variable. auto, zip, tar.gz or tgz.

variables.name: Game Assets SHA256
variables.description: Install-time variable. Optional checksum for the provided asset archive.

variables.name: Anti-VPN Enabled
variables.description: Runtime variable. Enable the anti-VPN runtime supervisor.

variables.name: Anti-VPN Mode
variables.description: Runtime variable. off, log-only or block.

variables.name: Anti-VPN Score Threshold
variables.description: Runtime variable. Weighted score required before a decision becomes blockable.

variables.name: Anti-VPN Allowlist
variables.description: Runtime variable. Comma or whitespace separated trusted IPs and CIDRs that always bypass anti-VPN checks.

variables.name: ProxyCheck API Key
variables.description: Provider variable. Optional API key for proxycheck.io. Without a key the provider runs on anonymous/free limits.

variables.name: ipapi.is API Key
variables.description: Provider variable. Optional API key for ipapi.is. Without a key the provider runs on anonymous/free limits.

variables.name: IPQualityScore API Key
variables.description: Provider variable. API key for IPQualityScore VPN and hosting checks.

variables.name: IPLocate API Key
variables.description: Provider variable. API key for IPLocate privacy, VPN and hosting checks.

variables.name: IPHub API Key
variables.description: Provider variable. API key for IPHub non-residential checks.

variables.name: vpnapi.io API Key
variables.description: Provider variable. Optional API key for vpnapi.io VPN checks.

variables.name: Anti-VPN Timeout (ms)
variables.description: Runtime variable. Per-provider request timeout in milliseconds.

variables.name: Anti-VPN Cache TTL
variables.description: Runtime variable. Local decision cache TTL. Supports Go-style durations such as 30m, 6h or 24h.

variables.name: Anti-VPN Cache Flush Interval
variables.description: Runtime variable. How often the local anti-VPN cache is flushed to disk. Supports Go-style durations such as 1s, 2s or 10s.

variables.name: Anti-VPN Decision Logging
variables.description: Runtime variable. Emit structured anti-VPN decision summaries into the console output. Separate audit logging still goes to the anti-VPN audit log path.

variables.name: Anti-VPN Audit Log Path
variables.description: Runtime variable. Path for the dedicated structured anti-VPN audit log inside the server volume.

variables.name: Anti-VPN Broadcast Mode
variables.description: Runtime variable. Public decision broadcast mode: off, block-only or pass-and-block.

variables.name: Anti-VPN Enforcement Mode
variables.description: Runtime variable. Select kick-only, ban-and-kick, ban-only or custom.

variables.name: Anti-VPN Broadcast Cooldown
variables.description: Runtime variable. Cooldown before repeating the same public anti-VPN result for the same slot/action. Supports Go-style durations such as 30s or 90s.

variables.name: Anti-VPN Pass Broadcast Template
variables.description: Runtime variable. Public server command template for a passed anti-VPN decision. Supports %PLAYER%, %SCORE%, %THRESHOLD%, %SUMMARY%, %IP% and %SLOT%.

variables.name: Anti-VPN Block Broadcast Template
variables.description: Runtime variable. Public server command template for a blocked anti-VPN decision. Supports %PLAYER%, %SCORE%, %THRESHOLD%, %SUMMARY%, %IP% and %SLOT%.

variables.name: Anti-VPN Ban Command
variables.description: Runtime variable. Advanced setting used only when Anti-VPN Enforcement Mode is custom. Supports %IP%.

variables.name: Anti-VPN Kick Command
variables.description: Runtime variable. Advanced setting used only when Anti-VPN Enforcement Mode is custom. Supports %SLOT% and %IP%.
